A

add(String, String, double) - Method in class FactsArray
checks if the given fact is already in the array, calls the update method if it is already in the array or adds it to the array if it is not.

B

BinaryTreeNode<Facts> - Class in Unnamed Package
Code adapted from Hussein's Binary Tree node simple node implementation for facts objects
BinaryTreeNode(Facts, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Constructor for class BinaryTreeNode
 

C

compareTo(Facts) - Method in class Facts
compares the keys of the given fact to the current one
count - Variable in class FactsArray
 
current - Variable in class FactsArray
 

E

exists(String) - Method in class FactsArray
Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and returns true or false based on if it is or is not found

F

Facts - Class in Unnamed Package
Class to store the key phrase, factual statement and confidence level
Facts() - Constructor for class Facts
empty constructor sets the values to blank or zero
Facts(String, String, double) - Constructor for class Facts
constructor takes in the key phrase, factual statement and confidence level
FactsArray - Class in Unnamed Package
Class to mannage an array of Facts objects and provide functionality
FactsBST - Class in Unnamed Package
Code adapted from Hussein's Binary Tree Binary tree implementation for Facts objects
FactsBST() - Constructor for class FactsBST
no element constructor sets the root node to null
fileName - Variable in class FactsArray
 
find(Facts) - Method in class FactsBST
finds the given fact in the tree and returns the data associated, from the root
find(Facts, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
finds the given fact in the tree and returns the data associated, from the given node

G

GenericsKbArrayApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Provides an interface for the user to interact with the knowledge base
GenericsKbArrayApp() - Constructor for class GenericsKbArrayApp
 
GenericsKbBSTApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Class to implement the UI of the Facts BST
GenericsKbBSTApp() - Constructor for class GenericsKbBSTApp
 
getConfidence() - Method in class Facts
returns the confidencee level
getHeight() - Method in class FactsBST
returns the height of the tree, from the root
getHeight(BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
returns the height of the tree, from the given node
getInfo() - Method in class Facts
returns the factual stement
getKey() - Method in class Facts
returns the key value phrase
getSize() - Method in class FactsBST
rerurns the size of the tree from the root
getSize(BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
Returns the size of the tree from the given node

I

insert(Facts, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
 
insert(String, String, double) - Method in class FactsBST
inserts a new fact given the key, phrase and confidence score, returns a string indicating success or failure, or updating the fact if the key already exists in the tree

K

knowledge - Variable in class FactsArray
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class GenericsKbArrayApp
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class GenericsKbBSTApp
 

S

search(String) - Method in class FactsArray
Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key as the one given and return it as a string
search(String) - Method in class FactsBST
searches for a node with a matching key, from the root
search(String, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
searches for a node with a matching key, from the node given
searchBySentence(String, String) - Method in class FactsArray
Searches for a Fact in the array that has the same key and factual statement as the one given and return it as a string
searchBySentence(String, String) - Method in class FactsBST
searches for a node with a matching key, and phrase from the key
searchBySentence(String, String, BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
searches for a node with a matching key,and phrase from the given node
setArray(String) - Method in class FactsArray
Class takes in a file name and reads the file into the array and returns a boolean to indicate if the file was read in successfully
setBST(String) - Method in class FactsBST
takes in the text file and adds each element to the binary tree, returns a boolean to indicate success or failure
setConfidence(double) - Method in class Facts
changes the confidence level
setInfo(String) - Method in class Facts
changes the factual statement

U

update(Facts, String, double) - Method in class FactsBST
updates the node d witht the new details phrase and confidence
update(String, double) - Method in class Facts
changes the factual statement and confidence level associated with the key phrase
update(String, String, double) - Method in class FactsArray
Finds a fact that matches the key of the given one, and changes the fact and confidence score if the confidence score is bigger than or equal to the previous one.

V

visit(BinaryTreeNode<Facts>) - Method in class FactsBST
prints out the data of the current node
